name: Red Velvet Cake 500gm
description: This visually striking, melt-in-your-mouth red velvet cake features layers of vibrant crimson sponge with a delicate hint of cocoa and a subtle tang from real buttermilk. Generously frosted with our signature silky cream cheese icing, it is a modern, velvety masterpiece perfect for any celebration.

name: Cookie Cake 750gm
description: Elevate your celebration with a thick, decadent cookie cake. Baked fresh using premium browned butter and loaded with rich, velvety chocolate chips, it offers a perfectly gooey center with crisp, chewy edges.

name: Nutella Cookie
description: A thick, gourmet cookie boasting golden, crisp edges and a soft, fudgy center. This indulgent treat is loaded with premium semi-sweet chocolate chunks and stuffed with a molten, gooey Nutella core.

name: ChocoChip Cookie
description: A thick, hearty cookie with a golden-caramelized exterior and a soft, molten center. Baked with cultured butter and loaded with hand-chopped dark and milk chocolate chunks, finished with a delicate sprinkle of flaky sea salt for the perfect sweet-to-salty balance.

name: Dubai Chocolate Cookie
description: Experience a viral sensation with our artisanal Dubai Chocolate Cookie. This thick, fudgy cocoa cookie hides a rich core of velvety pistachio cream and toasted, crispy kataifi. Every bite delivers the perfect harmony of snap, crunch, and melt-in-your-mouth indulgence.

name: Lotus Biscoff Cookie
description: This thick, artisanal cookie features crisp, golden edges yielding to a soft, molten center. Brimming with rich, caramelized notes and a warm hint of cinnamon, it is generously packed with creamy Biscoff butter and premium white chocolate chips.

name: M&M Galaxy Cookie
description: An indulgent treat featuring a gooey, brown-sugar cookie base, deeply marbled with rich cocoa swirls. Generously stuffed with premium, melt-in-your-mouth milk chocolate chunks and vibrant, candy-coated M&M's, it offers a visually stunning "space-like" aesthetic and the ultimate combination of soft, chewy, and crunchy textures.

name: Red Velvet Cookie
description: Indulge in our signature Red Velvet Cookie, delivering the classic rich cocoa flavor of traditional red velvet cake in a decadent, bakery-fresh treat. Baked to achieve a perfectly crisp edge and a melt-in-your-mouth, fudgy center.

name: Lotus Biscoff Brownie
description: Our Lotus Biscoff Brownie is a decadently rich, fudgy chocolate treat swirled with creamy cookie butter and loaded with crunchy caramelized biscuits. It perfectly balances deep cocoa with warm cinnamon and spice.

name: Oreo Brownie
description: An elevated twist on a classic, this Oreo Brownie features a dense, fudgy center and a delicate, crackly top. Made with premium dark cocoa and studded with Double-Stuf Oreos, every bite delivers the perfect balance of rich, velvety chocolate and a satisfying, cookies-and-cream crunch.

name: Pistachio Brownie
description: These irresistible Pistachio Brownies feature a dense, fudgy dark chocolate base layered with a crunchy, nutty pistachio cream and toasted kataifi filling.

name: Strawberry Brownie
description: A decadent twist on a classic, our Strawberry Brownie features a rich, fudgy chocolate base swirled with a vibrant, made-from-scratch strawberry compote. Baked to achieve the perfect crackly crust and a chewy, gooey center.

name: White Chocolate Brownie
description: This Decadent White Chocolate Brownie features a crinkly, paper-thin top, a velvety-soft center, and a rich, buttery custard flavor. Baked with melted premium white chocolate and studded with creamy chocolate bits.

name: Birthday Brownie Box of 9
description: Elevate your birthday celebrations with our Birthday Brownie Box of 9, a decadent assortment of 9 rich, fudgy brownies. Featuring an irresistible mix of classic, Nutella-swirled, and Pistachio flavors, this gourmet treat comes beautifully packaged with a festive birthday topper and a handwritten card.

name: Cookie Box of 4
description: Treat yourself or someone special to the ultimate cookie experience. Handcrafted with premium French butter and ethically sourced cocoa, this box of 4 lets you mix and match our signature, bakery-fresh flavors.
